message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Politbarometer I (January 1977 – December 1979)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4961","justification":"Monthly opinion polling data on government and political system in West Germany from 1977 to 1979."},{"title":"Nachwahlbefragung zur Bundestagswahl 1972","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3284","justification":"Post-election survey capturing voter behavior and attitudes towards political institutions in the 1972 German federal election."},{"title":"Vorwahlbefragung zur Bundestagswahl 1972","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3500","justification":"Pre-election survey capturing voter intentions and political opinions in the lead-up to the 1972 German federal election."},{"title":"Nachwahlbefragung zur Bundestagswahl 1976","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5038","justification":"Post-election survey capturing voter behavior and attitudes towards political institutions in the 1976 German federal election."},{"title":"Nachwahlbefragung zur Landtagswahl in Niedersachsen, August 1978","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5028","justification":"Post-election survey capturing voter behavior and attitudes in the 1978 Lower Saxony state election."}]}
